name: Nubra Valley
description: A stunning high-altitude cold desert famous for its sweeping white sand dunes, double-humped Bactrian camels, and massive Maitreya Buddha statue.
history: Originally known as Ldumra, meaning the 'valley of flowers'. It was an important stop on the caravan route.
famousFor: Hunder sand dunes, Bactrian camels, Diskit Monastery.
